reasoning: Candidate (right, 4x): a pixel-art sapphire gem in vivid cool blue with white highlight facets. It is not grimdark, not edgy, not corporate — it reads as a clean, competent pixel RPG collectible. However, the color temperature is notably cold/icy rather than the warm-sunny palette the target aesthetic demands. The highlight style is generic RPG inventory art rather than toy-diorama whimsy. Peer references (left) are a grid of dark metallic helmets — mostly gray dungeon-crawler armor — which themselves skew away from the bright/friendly Hyrule target, making side-by-side tonal comparison difficult; the helmets arguably pull the composition colder. The gem alone would not fail a Nintendo tone test outright, but it does not radiate the 'warm fairy-tale sparkle' of Echoes or Link's Awakening gem icons. No occult, fan-service, or GRIMDARK flags. The marginal score reflects a neutral-to-cool drift rather than an active tone violation.
